---
title: Costs and Getting Access
---

## How to request access
### Creating and Accessing User Accounts

[VU Amsterdam Qualtrics Central Brand](https://vuamsterdam.eu.qualtrics.com) allows for user's auto-enrolment. Any user with an enabled VU or ACTA email address may auto-enroll on VU's Central Brand. The email address will function as the account's username.

[VU's Central Brand](https://vuamsterdam.eu.qualtrics.com) makes use of Single-Sign On (SSO). This means that users can log in to Qualtrics using their VU credentials. Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) is required for all users, including employees, researchers, and students. Please note that MFA is not enabled by default for students and may require activation via the [IT Service Desk](mailto:servicedesk.it@vu.nl). 

#### Note to Existing Users: Login Error Disabled Account

Security settings are in place that disable a user account after a certain amount of inactivity. This threshold is currently 12 months. This setting follows security requirements regarding User Account Management.

![Notification of disabled Qualtrics account](/public/qualtrics-account-disabled.png)

A disabled account status does not affect its data.

Users who receive an error when trying to log back in after extended periods of inactivity (`User account is disabled`) should contact the [RDM Support Desk](mailto:rdm@vu.nl) to have their accounts re-enabled.

## Are there costs involved?

There are no costs involved. All students and researchers with a VU or ACTA email address can use Qualtrics for scientific purposes.
